description: Bundled Codex Questforge starter ambience pack. Tracks are optional local assets for panorama viewers and campaign ambience selection.
license_note: Generated by Adrián Melic with Suno v5.5 while using a paid Suno plan intended to grant commercial rights for newly generated outputs. Suno rights guidance: https://help.suno.com/en/articles/2410177. Keep account/subscription proof outside the repo if needed.

tracks.title: Flight Through Ash
tracks.credit: Generated by Adrián Melic with Suno v5.5 for Codex Questforge on 2026-06-08.
tracks.prompt: Urgent escape through burning ruins, music only. Fast frame drums, struck lute bodies, low strings, tense ostinato, breathless pursuit, protagonist in real danger. Loopable CRPG chase cue, acoustic pressure, no heroic fanfare, no electronic pulse, no sound effects.

tracks.title: Shieldwall Pulse
tracks.credit: Generated by Adrián Melic with Suno v5.5 for Codex Questforge on 2026-06-08.
tracks.prompt: Physical melee combat loop with no electronics. Layered frame drums, low skin drums, struck lute bodies, bowed bass strings, tense off-beat accents, shieldwall pressure, close quarters danger. Dark fantasy CRPG battle bed, loopable, aggressive, dry, human, not heroic and not synthetic.

tracks.title: Archive of Dust
tracks.credit: Generated by Adrián Melic with Suno v5.5 for Codex Questforge on 2026-06-08.
tracks.prompt: QF-030 ancient library or archive interior. Viola da gamba, soft low strings, sparse lute harmonics, very quiet frame drum, scholarly mystery, old parchment, hidden knowledge. Loopable dialogue and investigation bed, acoustic and restrained.

tracks.title: Rest at Low Fire
tracks.credit: Generated by Adrián Melic with Suno v5.5 for Codex Questforge on 2026-06-08.
tracks.prompt: QF-028 quiet camp rest music after danger. Warm lute, viola da gamba, soft bowed strings, tiny frame drum pulse, tired safety, night road, gentle recovery. Loopable acoustic CRPG background, intimate and human, music only with no fire sound effects.

tracks.title: Battle Under Stone
tracks.credit: Generated by Adrián Melic with Suno v5.5 for Codex Questforge on 2026-06-08.
tracks.prompt: QF-027 tense underground combat loop. Low bowed strings, heavy frame drums, muted war pulses, viola da gamba drones, urgent but controlled, tactical dark fantasy CRPG battle bed. No heroic brass, no climax, no choir, no sound effects, loopable and aggressive without becoming modern.

tracks.title: Stone Descent Strings
tracks.credit: Generated by Adrián Melic with Suno v5.5 for Codex Questforge on 2026-06-08.
tracks.prompt: QF-017 acoustic-only dungeon exploration background. Low bowed strings, viola da gamba, contrabass-like drone from strings, sparse frame drum, muted lute notes, stone corridor tension. Slow loopable CRPG bed, no lead melody, no choir, no sound effects, no environmental rain or thunder.

tracks.title: Veil of Stars Choir
tracks.credit: Generated by Adrián Melic with Suno v5.5 for Codex Questforge on 2026-06-08.
tracks.prompt: QF-016 mysterious celestial fantasy chapel cue. Wordless invented-language choir, low strings, viola da gamba, soft frame drum pulse, reverent and intense but not loud. Loopable background for sacred ruins or astral threshold. No modern instruments, no bright melody.

tracks.title: Crown of Ash Choir
tracks.credit: Generated by Adrián Melic with Suno v5.5 for Codex Questforge on 2026-06-08.
tracks.prompt: QF-015 solemn dark fantasy CRPG choir cue for a major revelation. Mixed choir in invented non-English syllables, low bowed strings, frame drums, ancient oath energy, slow final swell with emotional payoff. Acoustic and cinematic, original fantasy score mood, no electronic texture.

tracks.title: Chapel of Embers Choir
tracks.credit: Generated by Adrián Melic with Suno v5.5 for Codex Questforge on 2026-06-08.
tracks.prompt: QF-014 sacred candlelit fantasy chapel. Wordless invented-language choir, low strings, soft frame drum, ancient stone resonance, mournful but beautiful. Intimate reverent CRPG background, no modern electronics, no piano, no bells, no bright flute, no intelligible lyrics.

tracks.title: Oath of the Ashen Choir
tracks.credit: Generated by Adrián Melic with Suno v5.5 for Codex Questforge on 2026-06-08.
tracks.prompt: QF-013 epic but restrained dark fantasy CRPG choir theme. Mixed choir sings invented non-English syllables, low strings, hand drums, solemn heroic mystery, ancient oath feeling. No recognizable language, no pop singer, no electronic synth, no piano. Loopable cinematic game cue, original fantasy soundtrack mood.
